PostCompact.command: echo 'CONTEXT RECOVERY — Project: CON-CORE. Stack: React+Vite+TS, Vercel Serverless, Supabase PostgreSQL. Re-read CLAUDE.md and current request. Check .claude/handoff.md for session state.'

PreToolUse.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then STAGED=$(cd /Users/justinpinero/Desktop/projects/CON-CORE && git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); if echo "$STAGED" | grep -qE '\.env$|\.env\.local$|credentials|secret|password'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Staged files may contain secrets. Review before committing.' && exit 1; fi; fi; exit 0

PostToolUse.command: FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":"//;s/"//'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css|json|md)$'; then cd /Users/justinpinero/Desktop/projects/CON-CORE && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":"//;s/"//'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(jsx|tsx)$'; then cd /Users/justinpinero/Desktop/projects/CON-CORE && npx eslint --rule '{"jsx-a11y/alt-text":"warn","jsx-a11y/aria-props":"warn","jsx-a11y/role-has-required-aria-props":"warn"}' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
